_meta.keyKnowledge: We analyse needs or opportunities for designing, develop design briefs, and investigate materials, systems and processes to create solutions.

_source.w: We analyse needs or opportunities for designing, develop design briefs, and investigate materials, systems and processes to create solutions.
y: Professional-level design practice begins with rigorous needs analysis and comprehensive investigation.
Developing design briefs teaches us to define problems clearly and set measurable success criteria.
Thorough investigation ensures our solutions are informed, feasible and well-suited to real needs.
eg: We conduct stakeholder research to identify genuine needs and opportunities for design.
We develop comprehensive design briefs with clear objectives, constraints and success criteria.
We investigate materials, systems and processes through testing, research and expert consultation.
We analyse competing requirements and make informed decisions about priorities.
We document our investigation findings and use them to guide design development.
We present our design brief and investigation to peers for critical feedback.
